requestment_date.text: วันที่ขอกู้

root.sql:
select sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'SD' ) as requestment_day , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'MONTH' ) as requestment_month , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'YYYY' ) as requestment_year , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as requestment_tdate
, extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ) ) - extract ( year from ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ) ) as age_year , pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card ) as id_card , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) as group_name ,( select salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as salary_amount
, sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.moo , sc_mem_m_member_address.road , sc_mem_m_member_address.soi , pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol) as tambol , pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as district_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as province_name , sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode , sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone
, ( select sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping from sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.keeping_fingroup and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) as member_group_keeping --กลุ่มส่งหัก
, ( select sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_name from sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.keeping_fingroup and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) as keeping_group_name
, ( select decode(( select sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_position where sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long ), null ,position_long ,(select sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_position where sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long )) from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as position_long
from sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_member_address ,sc_cnt_m_coop where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' --ปัจจุบัน /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = '012054' --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date = '08/08/2024' order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no
